title: Migrate to fieldwork::theme
description:
Replace broadside's inline theme.rs with fieldwork::theme module.

Changes:
- Replace crate::theme::load_theme_css() with fieldwork::theme::load_theme_css()
- Replace inline BASE_CSS constant in server.rs with fieldwork::theme::BASE_CSS
- Replace inline </style> stripping in server.rs with fieldwork::theme::load_extra_css() which handles theme tokens + custom CSS + sanitization in one call
- Delete broadside/src/theme.rs (now provided by fieldwork)
- Update config to pass theme_tokens_path and custom_css_path to fieldwork::theme::load_extra_css()

The CSS value validation (is_safe_css_value) from broadside's pentest has been merged into fieldwork::theme.
